evidence.finding: The October 2025 terms limit downloads to private noncommercial use; prohibit AI, automated analysis, machine learning, NLP, speech-to-text, scraping, editing, shortening, and reuse of excerpts; and require prior written BUCHFUNK GmbH permission for research, development, or testing.

The catalog provides professionally presented German audiobooks with named speakers and durations; many title pages offer downloadable audio and PDF text, making the source operationally strong if explicit permission is obtained.

conditions: Prior written permission from BUCHFUNK GmbH is required.
Speech-to-text, NLP, and automated analysis are prohibited without prior written permission.
Shortening, editing, and use of excerpts are prohibited without prior written permission.
Commercial use and research, development, or testing require prior written permission.

blockers: Obtain prior written BUCHFUNK GmbH permission for exact named titles and speakers.

Permission must cover local download, speech-to-text model evaluation, automated analysis, normalization, exact clip extraction, transcript correction, commercial product research, retention, and publication of aggregate metrics and short error examples.
Select at least three independent works and speakers, then prove that they do not overlap MLS/LibriSpeech development source groups.
notes: Do not download or stream files for benchmark analysis before permission is recorded.
The terms provide info@buchfunk.de for license, AI, media, and research requests.
If permission is granted, create one accepted source-group review per complete work before local import.
